speaking/00_gioi_thieu.html.title: 📌 Giới thiệu
speaking/00_gioi_thieu.html.body: 🗣️ Giới thiệu Kỹ năng Speaking (Nói) Tổng quan Phần thi Speaking (Nói) trong kỳ thi VSTEP B1 đánh giá khả năng giao tiếp bằng tiếng Anh của thí sinh qua 3 phần thi khác nhau. Cấu trúc bài thi Phần Tên Thời gian Mô tả Part 1 Social Interaction (Giao tiếp xã hội) ~3 phút Trả lời câu hỏi về các chủ đề quen thuộc: bản thân, gia đình, sở thích, công việc. Part 2 Solution Discussion (Thảo luận giải pháp) 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói Đọc một tình huống có 3 lựa chọn, chọn 1 lựa chọn tốt nhất và giải thích tại sao. Part 3 Topic Development (Phát triển chủ đề) 1 phút chuẩn bị + 4 phút nói Dựa vào sơ đồ tư duy (mindmap) có sẵn, phát triển bài nói và trả lời câu hỏi thảo luận thêm. Lời khuyên chung Luôn trả lời đủ ý, không bỏ câu hỏi nào. Cố gắng đa dạng hóa từ vựng và cấu trúc câu, tránh lặp từ. Pronunciation: Phát âm rõ ràng, không cần accent hoàn hảo, nhưng cần dễ nghe. Fluency: Hạn chế dừng lại quá lâu. Có thể dùng fillers tự nhiên: "Well...", "Let me think...", "That's a good question...".

speaking/01_tieu_chi.html.title: 🎯 Tiêu chí chấm điểm
speaking/01_tieu_chi.html.body: 🎯 Tiêu chí chấm điểm Speaking Thang điểm Bài thi Speaking được chấm theo thang 10 điểm, chia đều cho 4 tiêu chí. 4 Tiêu chí đánh giá 1. Fluency & Coherence (Lưu loát & Mạch lạc) Nói liên tục, không dừng lại quá lâu giữa chừng. Ý tưởng liên kết mạch lạc, có logic. Sử dụng linking words tự nhiên (however, moreover, on the other hand, as a result...). 2. Lexical Resource (Vốn từ vựng) Đa dạng từ vựng, tránh lặp từ. Dùng từ chính xác theo nghĩa và ngữ cảnh (collocation đúng). Sử dụng được các cụm từ, idioms tự nhiên trong hội thoại. 3. Grammatical Range & Accuracy (Ngữ pháp) Dùng được nhiều cấu trúc câu: đơn, ghép, phức. Kiểm soát lỗi ngữ pháp (thì, mạo từ, số ít/nhiều). Dùng được câu điều kiện, câu tường thuật, mệnh đề quan hệ. 4. Pronunciation (Phát âm) Phát âm dễ nghe, rõ ràng. Nhấn vào âm tiết đúng chỗ (word stress). Nối âm tự nhiên (connected speech) trong chuỗi câu. Quy đổi Band điểm Band Điểm Mô tả C1 8.5 – 10 Nói trôi chảy, từ vựng phong phú, ngữ pháp gần như không lỗi B2 7.0 – 8.5 Nói tốt, lỗi nhỏ không ảnh hưởng giao tiếp B1 5.5 – 7.0 Đủ giao tiếp, còn lỗi nhưng vẫn hiểu được ý A2 4.0 – 5.5 Giao tiếp hạn chế, nhiều lỗi, dừng lại nhiều

speaking/02_huong_dan.html.title: 📖 Hướng dẫn cách làm
speaking/02_huong_dan.html.body: 📖 Hướng dẫn cách làm bài Speaking 🎯 Chọn lộ trình của bạn: Lộ trình B1 (Đạt chuẩn): Ưu tiên truyền đạt đủ ý, hạn chế lỗi nghiêm trọng. Lộ trình B2/C1 (Điểm cao): Ưu tiên ngôn ngữ phong phú, lập luận sâu, fluency tự nhiên. Part 1 — Social Interaction (Giao tiếp xã hội) ✅ Lộ trình B1 — Đạt chuẩn Mục tiêu: Trả lời đủ, rõ ràng, không bỏ câu. Luôn trả lời đầy đủ: Không bao giờ chỉ trả lời Yes/No. Luôn kèm lý do ngắn. ✅ "Yes, I do. I like going out every weekend because I can relax." ❌ "Yes." Dùng câu mở đầu an toàn: "Well, I think..." / "To be honest..." / "In my opinion..." Gộp câu hỏi: Nếu có 3 câu hỏi liên quan, gộp thành 1 câu trả lời mạch lạc. Nếu không hiểu câu hỏi: Lịch sự nhờ nhắc lại — "Could you please repeat the question?" Linking words đơn giản cần thuộc lòng:because, also, however, first of all, for example, and so 🚀 Lộ trình B2/C1 — Điểm cao Mở rộng câu trả lời có chiều sâu: Đừng chỉ trả lời 1 câu, hãy phát triển thành 4-5 câu. "When it comes to going out, I'd say I make it a habit to unwind every weekend — usually with my close-knit group of friends at a cozy indie café, mainly because I find the ambiance there really helps me decompress after a grueling workweek." Đa dạng cấu trúc câu: Trộn câu đơn, ghép, phức và câu điều kiện. Linking words nâng cao:Moreover, In addition to that, On the other hand, Despite the fact that, Interestingly enough, What's more Thêm personal anecdote (câu chuyện thực tế): "I recall one particular time when... and it really made me realize that..." Kỹ thuật "Bắc cầu" (Bridging): Chủ động dẫn dắt sang ý mình muốn nói. "That's a great question. It actually reminds me of..." Part 2 — Solution Discussion (Thảo luận giải pháp) ✅ Lộ trình B1 — Đạt chuẩn Cấu trúc template cần học thuộc: "In this situation, I think [OPTION X] is the best choice." "Firstly, [lý do 1]." "Secondly, [lý do 2]." "That's why I recommend [OPTION X]." Bác bỏ đơn giản 2 lựa chọn còn lại: "Option B is not a good idea because..." "Option C might be useful, but [lý do không chọn]." Từ vựng an toàn cho B1: good, suitable, helpful, convenient, not a good idea, better, more useful 🚀 Lộ trình B2/C1 — Điểm cao Cấu trúc mở rộng: "Considering the situation carefully, I firmly believe that [OPTION X] would be the most strategic choice." "First and foremost, [lý do 1 + ví dụ cụ thể]." "Furthermore, [lý do 2 + giải thích sâu hơn]." "While [OPTION B] may seem appealing at first glance, it falls short because [lý do]." "Similarly, [OPTION C] fails to address the core issue of..." "Therefore, I am of the strong opinion that [OPTION X] is the most well-rounded solution." Từ vựng nâng cao: strategic, feasible, well-rounded, address the root cause, outweigh, in contrast, be rendered ineffective Kỹ thuật nâng điểm: Dùng câu điều kiện type 2 để phân tích: "If we were to choose Option B, the outcome would likely be..." Part 3 — Topic Development (Phát triển chủ đề) ✅ Lộ trình B1 — Đạt chuẩn Đọc sơ đồ Mindmap trong 1 phút chuẩn bị: Gạch chân từ khóa quan trọng. Phát triển bài nói theo thứ tự từng nhánh: Mỗi nhánh = 1 đoạn nói, khoảng 2-3 câu. Kết bài: Nhắc lại chủ đề và thêm ý kiến riêng. Follow-up questions: Trả lời ngắn gọn 2-3 câu, đủ ý là được. Template mở bài B1:"The topic I'm going to talk about is [TOPIC]. I will discuss [số nhánh] main points." 🚀 Lộ trình B2/C1 — Điểm cao Mở bài ấn tượng (Hook): Đừng mở bài thẳng vào chủ đề, hãy tạo bối cảnh trước. "In today's increasingly interconnected world, the issue of [TOPIC] has never been more relevant. I would like to explore several key dimensions of this fascinating subject." Phát triển mỗi nhánh thành mini-đoạn hoàn chỉnh (3-4 câu): Nêu ý → Giải thích → Ví dụ cụ thể → Nhận xét. "To begin with, [nhánh 1]. This is particularly significant because [giải thích]. A compelling example would be [ví dụ]. As a result, [kết luận nhỏ]." Thêm phân tích phản biện (Counter-argument): "While some may argue that [ý kiến đối lập], I believe that [phản biện lại]..." Follow-up questions: Mở rộng ít nhất 5-6 câu/câu hỏi, kết hợp ví dụ thực tế và con số nếu biết. 🔑 Mẹo chung cho cả hai lộ trình Vấn đề Giải pháp B1 Giải pháp B2/C1 Quên từ cần nói Dùng từ đơn giản hơn Dùng circumlocution (mô tả xung quanh) Nói quá chậm Luyện nói theo thời gian Luyện rhythm và linking âm tự nhiên Lặp từ Học 3-5 từ đồng nghĩa mỗi chủ đề Dùng pronoun, synonym, paraphrase Nói lạc đề Dừng lại và quay lại: "Sorry, what I mean is..." Bridging tự nhiên sang ý đúng

speaking/Part1/001.html.title: 🔖 Đề 001
speaking/Part1/001.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about going out. How often do you go out? Why? Who do you usually go out with? Why? Where do you often go when you go out? Why? Now, let’s talk about a special place you would always want to return to. Can you describe that place? Did you go there alone or with someone else? What makes you want to return to that place?

speaking/Part1/004.html.title: 🔖 Đề 004
speaking/Part1/004.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about holidays. What did you do on your last holiday? Who do you prefer spending your holidays with? Do you prefer going on holidays abroad? Now, let's talk about TV programs. How many hours a day do you watch television? What kinds of programs do you like? Do you prefer watching television alone or with others? Why?

speaking/Part1/007.html.title: 🔖 Đề 007
speaking/Part1/007.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about birthdays. When is your birthday? What do you usually do on your birthday? What is your favorite family celebration? Why? Now, let's talk about public transportation. What is the best way to travel in your town or city? What is your favorite means of transportation? Do you think people should use public transportation more? Why?

speaking/Part1/008.html.title: 🔖 Đề 008
speaking/Part1/008.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about music. Do you like music? What kind of music do you like best? Why? What is the most popular kind of music in your country? How is music good or bad for people? Now, let's talk about English. Did you learn English at secondary school? What do you think about how English is taught at school now? In what ways has children's English improved nowadays?

speaking/Part1/009.html.title: 🔖 Đề 009
speaking/Part1/009.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about favorite places. Where do you usually go when you have spare time? Are there many interesting places where you live for people to go at weekends? In what ways is a café a great place for people to enjoy their free time? Now, let's talk about school subjects. What subject did you like most when you were at school? Do you think English is a good subject for all students to learn at school? Why? Do you think students are learning too many subjects at school nowadays?

speaking/Part1/010.html.title: 🔖 Đề 010
speaking/Part1/010.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about your hometown. Where are you from? Do you like living in your hometown? What is it famous for? Now, let's talk about your career. What is your job? How long have you been working? Why do you like your job?

speaking/Part1/011.html.title: 🔖 Đề 011
speaking/Part1/011.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about your hobby. What do you like doing in your free time? Why do you enjoy doing it? How much time do you spend on it? Now, let's talk about English. Do you like English? When did you start learning English? How do you improve your English?

speaking/Part1/012.html.title: 🔖 Đề 012
speaking/Part1/012.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about your hometown. When is the best time to visit your hometown? Why? What do you like most about your hometown? Do you think your hometown is the best place to grow up? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about friends. What is your best friend like? How did you meet your best friend? In your opinion, what is the most important quality of a good friend?

speaking/Part1/013.html.title: 🔖 Đề 013
speaking/Part1/013.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about your leisure time. Do you enjoy your leisure time? What do you often do in your free time? Have your leisure activities changed since you were a child? Now, let's talk about books. What kinds of books do you like to read? Do you read the same types of books now as you did 5 years ago? When do you think is the best time to read? Why?

speaking/Part1/014.html.title: 🔖 Đề 014
speaking/Part1/014.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about social networks. What do you like about social networks? What social networks are you using now? Why? What is your advice for social network users? Now, let's talk about fashion. How important is fashion to you? What kinds of clothes do you prefer to wear? Do you ever have to wear things you don't really like? If so, when and why?

speaking/Part1/015.html.title: 🔖 Đề 015
speaking/Part1/015.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about the rooms in your house. Which room in your house do you like the most? What do you like doing there? Do you like having guests in your room? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about sports. Do you play any sports? What sports do you enjoy watching? What sports do you enjoy playing?

speaking/Part1/016.html.title: 🔖 Đề 016
speaking/Part1/016.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about your reading habits. Do you enjoy reading? Why or why not? What types of books or magazines do you like reading? Where do you prefer to read? Now, let's talk about your free time. What do you like doing in your free time? Who do you enjoy spending your free time with? Where do you prefer to spend your free time?

speaking/Part1/017.html.title: 🔖 Đề 017
speaking/Part1/017.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about ways of relaxing. What do you do to relax? Where do you want to go to relax? Do you like relaxing on your own or with others? Now, let's talk about rooms at home. Which is the most important room in your house? What makes it important? What do you do in that room?

speaking/Part1/018.html.title: 🔖 Đề 018
speaking/Part1/018.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about films. Do you like watching films? What types of films do you like? Who do you enjoy watching films with? Now, let's talk about mobile phones. Do you use a mobile phone? What are the advantages of mobile phones? What are the disadvantages of mobile phones?

speaking/Part1/019.html.title: 🔖 Đề 019
speaking/Part1/019.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about sports. Do you prefer indoor or outdoor sports? Why? Which sports do you like the most? Why? Why do you think people like playing sports? Now, let's talk about fast food. What kind of fast food do you like the most? Is fast food good for your health? Why or why not? In your opinion, why is fast food popular?

speaking/Part1/020.html.title: 🔖 Đề 020
speaking/Part1/020.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about habits. What is your typical day like? Do you have any habits that annoy other people? What do you usually do when you feel upset? Now, let's talk about the weather. What is the weather like today? Do you prefer hot or cold weather? Why? What activities do you recommend for different types of weather?

speaking/Part1/021.html.title: 🔖 Đề 021
speaking/Part1/021.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about cooking. Who does the cooking in your family? Do you think cooking is a task only women should do? Why or why not? Do you like cooking by yourself? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about TV programs. What is the worst TV program you have ever seen? How much TV do you watch every day? What are some advantages of watching TV?

speaking/Part1/022.html.title: 🔖 Đề 022
speaking/Part1/022.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about money. How much did you spend last week? What do you spend most of your money on? Can money buy happiness? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about shopping. What is your favorite place to shop? What was the last thing you bought for someone else? Where and why? Do you prefer shopping alone or with others? Why?

speaking/Part1/023.html.title: 🔖 Đề 023
speaking/Part1/023.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about museums. Do you like visiting museums? If yes, how often? If not, why not? What is usually displayed in the museum near your home? How is visiting museums good or bad for young people? Now, let's talk about special events in your country. What are some important events in your country? Can you name one or two things people commonly do during these events? Do you think it is a good idea to celebrate all such events in the same way?

speaking/Part1/024.html.title: 🔖 Đề 024
speaking/Part1/024.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about secondary schools in your area. Are there many secondary schools where you live? What do these schools have in common? In what ways do you think schools play an important role in the Vietnamese education system? Now, let's talk about English. When did you start learning English? Do you think English is a good subject for students to learn at school? Why or why not? Do you think students are learning too many subjects nowadays?

speaking/Part1/025.html.title: 🔖 Đề 025
speaking/Part1/025.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about health. What do people where you live do to keep fit? Do you think they are practicing in the right way? In what ways is going to the gym good or not good for older people? Now, let's talk about healthcare services where you live. What do people in your area usually do when they have health problems? Do you think it is good to open private clinics? What are the downsides of having too many private clinics?

speaking/Part1/026.html.title: 🔖 Đề 026
speaking/Part1/026.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about happiness. What does happiness mean to you? Do you think rich people are always happy? What do you do to make yourself happy? Now, let's talk about money. Do you think money is more important than other aspects of life? What would you do if you had a lot of money? What are the downsides of having too much money?

speaking/Part1/027.html.title: 🔖 Đề 027
speaking/Part1/027.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about restaurants. Tell me about your favourite restaurant. What is your opinion of foreign food? Why do people like eating out? Now, let's talk about relaxation. What activities can people do to relax? How do you usually relax? In what ways can you relax without spending any money?

speaking/Part1/028.html.title: 🔖 Đề 028
speaking/Part1/028.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about housework. How do you share housework in your family? Do you think children should help with the housework? What are some activities that your family usually does together? Now, let's talk about fashion. Do you try to follow the latest fashion trends? What kinds of clothes do you like to wear? Do you prefer shopping in small stores or supermarkets?

speaking/Part1/029.html.title: 🔖 Đề 029
speaking/Part1/029.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about friends. Could you tell me about your best friend? What is important in a friend for you? What kind of people do you enjoy spending time with? Now, let's talk about houses. Would you rather live in a big city or in the countryside? Why? Could you describe your house/flat and the rooms in it? Which is your favourite place at home and why?

speaking/Part1/030.html.title: 🔖 Đề 030
speaking/Part1/030.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about school. What were your favourite subjects or lessons at school? Why? What is an ideal teacher like for you? What are some of your best memories from school years? Now, let's talk about jobs. Could you tell me about the job you would like to have in the future? Would you prefer to be self-employed or work for a company? Why? Have you ever had a summer job? If yes, could you tell me about it? If no, would you like to have one this summer? Why or why not?

speaking/Part1/031.html.title: 🔖 Đề 031
speaking/Part1/031.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about food. What do you normally have for breakfast, lunch or dinner? How healthy is your diet? Where do you like to eat? Why? Now, let's talk about sports. What do you do to stay fit? How important is sport to your family? What sports are you interested in? Why?

speaking/Part1/032.html.title: 🔖 Đề 032
speaking/Part1/032.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about watching TV. Could you tell me about your family's TV viewing habits? What are your favourite TV programmes and why? Which do you prefer: watching a film on TV or going to the cinema? Why? Now, let's talk about transport. What is your favourite means of transport and why? What do you think of the traffic in your area or town? Could you give me directions to the nearest shop from here, please?

speaking/Part1/033.html.title: 🔖 Đề 033
speaking/Part1/033.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about holidays. Could you tell me about a holiday you really enjoyed? What kind of holiday do you prefer and why? What means of transport do you prefer when you go on holiday? Why? Now, let's talk about transport. What is your favourite means of transport and why? What do you think of the traffic in your area or town? How do you travel to work or school every day?

speaking/Part1/034.html.title: 🔖 Đề 034
speaking/Part1/034.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about holidays. What do you like doing when you are on holiday? Could you tell me about your dream holiday? How do you prepare for a holiday? Now, let's talk about food. What does your family usually eat and drink on special occasions (e.g. birthdays, holidays)? Where do you like to eat? Why? Do you prefer traditional restaurants or fast food places? Why?

speaking/Part1/090.html.title: 🔖 Đề 090
speaking/Part1/090.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about fast food restaurants. Have you ever been to a fast food restaurant? What is your favorite fast food? Is it healthy to eat fast food? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about sleeping habits. How many hours do you sleep a day? How important is it to have a good sleep? What should we do to sleep better?

speaking/Part1/093.html.title: 🔖 Đề 093
speaking/Part1/093.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about renting a house or flat. Have you ever rented a house? Would you prefer to pay the rent monthly or yearly? What do you look for in a rented house? Why? Now, let's talk about mobile phone service. How often do you use your mobile phone? Are you satisfied with your mobile phone service? Why? In your opinion, what makes a good mobile phone service?

speaking/Part1/096.html.title: 🔖 Đề 096
speaking/Part1/096.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about traditional music. Do you often listen to traditional music? What is your favorite traditional song? How important is traditional music in your country? Now, let's talk about cooking classes. Have you ever joined a cooking class? Would you prefer to go alone or with someone else? How important do you think cooking classes are?

speaking/Part1/099.html.title: 🔖 Đề 099
speaking/Part1/099.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about seasons. How many seasons are there in your country? What is your favorite season? What is the best season to visit your country? Now, let's talk about music. Who is your favorite artist? Can you name a song that describes yourself? What kind of music do you like best?

speaking/Part1/102.html.title: 🔖 Đề 102
speaking/Part1/102.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about community service. What kinds of community service have you done? Who usually joins in community activities? What are the benefits of participating in community service? Now, let's talk about your relationship with your parents. Who are you closer to: your father or your mother? What do you like to do when you spend time together? Do you want to live with your parents when you get married?

speaking/Part1/105.html.title: 🔖 Đề 105
speaking/Part1/105.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about your favorite website. Do you often listen to music? Why or why not? What is your favorite website? Please describe it. Why is it your favorite website for listening to music? Now, let's talk about wearing uniforms. Did you wear a uniform at school? Do you like wearing uniforms? What are the benefits of wearing uniforms?

speaking/Part1/108.html.title: 🔖 Đề 108
speaking/Part1/108.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about friendship. Who is your best friend? What do you usually do together? In your opinion, what makes a good friend? Now, let's talk about a balanced diet. Do you follow a balanced diet? What kind of food do you usually eat? In your opinion, what food should you eat more of?

speaking/Part1/111.html.title: 🔖 Đề 111
speaking/Part1/111.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about jobs. Do you work or study? Why did you choose that job or major? Do you think you will change your job or field of study? Now, let's talk about the weather. What is your favorite kind of weather? Does the weather affect the way you feel? Do you like the weather in your country?

speaking/Part1/114.html.title: 🔖 Đề 114
speaking/Part1/114.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about holidays. How often do you have holidays? When do Vietnamese people normally have holidays? What do you usually do during summer holidays? Now, let's talk about handicrafts. Have you ever made any handicrafts? What kinds of handicrafts do people in your country often make? Is making handicrafts important for children? Why or why not?

speaking/Part1/117.html.title: 🔖 Đề 117
speaking/Part1/117.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about banking in your area. Have you ever been to a bank in your area? What did you do there? How does the ATM service work in your area? Now, let's talk about going out. How often do you go out? Do you prefer going out alone or with friends? Why? What do you like to do when you go out?

speaking/Part1/120.html.title: 🔖 Đề 120
speaking/Part1/120.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about wedding parties. Have you ever taken part in a wedding party? What do you like most at a wedding party? What kind of clothes do you wear when attending a wedding party? Now, let's talk about eating habits. What do you often have for breakfast/lunch/dinner? What is the most popular dish in Vietnam? Do people in Vietnam often eat out at the weekend? Why or why not?

speaking/Part1/123.html.title: 🔖 Đề 123
speaking/Part1/123.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about Vietnamese actresses. Do you have a favorite Vietnamese actress? What makes a good actress? Is the movie industry developed in your country? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about your day off. How often do you have a day off work? What activities do you often do on that day? Which do you prefer: spending the day on your own or with someone else?

speaking/Part1/126.html.title: 🔖 Đề 126
speaking/Part1/126.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about places. Do you live far from your hometown? What part of the country do most people live in? How easy is it to travel around your country? Now, let's talk about art. Are you good at art? Did you study art at school when you were a child? Is art a popular subject in your country?

speaking/Part1/129.html.title: 🔖 Đề 129
speaking/Part1/129.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about foreign languages. What foreign language do you speak? Do you enjoy learning a foreign language? How important is it to learn a foreign language? Now, let's talk about sleeping habits. How many hours a day do you sleep? How important is it to have a good sleep? What should we do to have a good sleep?

speaking/Part1/132.html.title: 🔖 Đề 132
speaking/Part1/132.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about freetime activities. What do you often do in your free time? Which channel do you like most? What kind of books do you like? Now, let's talk about traffic in your town. Is there much traffic in your town? What is the most common means of transport? What do you think are the solutions to traffic jams?

speaking/Part1/135.html.title: 🔖 Đề 135
speaking/Part1/135.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about flowers. Do you like flowers? What is your favorite flower? Do any flowers have a special meaning in your country? Now, let's talk about favorite places. When you are sad, where do you often go? Do you prefer to be there alone or with someone else? Which places do you recommend your friends to go?

speaking/Part1/138.html.title: 🔖 Đề 138
speaking/Part1/138.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about pets. Do you like animals? What is the most popular pet in your country? Why do people have pets? Now, let's talk about childhood. What is your favorite childhood memory? Why did you like it? Do you still like it when you get older? Why?

speaking/Part1/141.html.title: 🔖 Đề 141
speaking/Part1/141.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about cinema. How often do you go to the cinema? Would you prefer to watch films at home or at the cinema? How important is it to go to the cinema? Now, let's talk about shopping. Do you enjoy going shopping? How much time do you spend shopping every week? Do you enjoy going shopping alone or with your friends?

speaking/Part1/144.html.title: 🔖 Đề 144
speaking/Part1/144.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about weather. What is your favorite weather? Does the weather affect the way you feel? Do you like the weather in your country? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about working/school costume. What kind of clothes do you wear to work/school? Do you think people should wear uniforms at work/school? What kind of clothes don't you wear at work?

speaking/Part1/147.html.title: 🔖 Đề 147
speaking/Part1/147.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about secondary school. How do you feel about your secondary school? Which subject do you think is the most difficult for you? Are you still in contact with your friends from secondary school? Now, let's talk about lifestyle. Do you have three meals a day? What do you often do to relax in the evening? Do you feel happy with your lifestyle?

speaking/Part1/150.html.title: 🔖 Đề 150
speaking/Part1/150.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about swimming. Do you like swimming? Do you prefer to swim alone or with someone else? Is it important to swim? Why or why not? Now, let's talk about high school. What is your high school like? What happened on the first day of high school? Which high school subject do you think is most useful for people in adult life?

speaking/Part1/153.html.title: 🔖 Đề 153
speaking/Part1/153.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about daily life. How important is it to have a good sleep? What should we do to have a good sleep? Can you suggest some ways to stay healthy? Now, let's talk about neighbours. Do you like your neighbours? How often do you talk to your neighbours? Has a neighbour ever helped you?

speaking/Part1/156.html.title: 🔖 Đề 156
speaking/Part1/156.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about sports. What kind of sports do you like? How often do you play sports? In your opinion, why do many people like playing sports? Now, let's talk about books. What kind of books do you like? How many hours a day do you read books? What are the benefits of reading books?

speaking/Part1/159.html.title: 🔖 Đề 159
speaking/Part1/159.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about computer/laptop. Do you own a computer or a laptop? Do you use your laptop at work or at home? What do you mostly do on your laptop/computer? Now, let's talk about your favorite beach. What is your favorite beach in Vietnam? How often do you go there? What do you often do when you are there?

speaking/Part1/160.html.title: 🔖 Đề 160
speaking/Part1/160.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about a room in your house. What is your favorite room in your house? What do you usually do in your room? How do you like to decorate your room? Now, let's talk about secondary school. Who is your favorite teacher at secondary school? What is your favorite subject? What subject do you find the most difficult?

speaking/Part1/161.html.title: 🔖 Đề 161
speaking/Part1/161.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about study. What is your favorite subject? What is the most popular subject in your country? Do you get on well with your classmates? Now, let's talk about lifestyle. Do you have a busy social life? What do you do to relax in the evening? Do you feel happy with your lifestyle?

speaking/Part1/162.html.title: 🔖 Đề 162
speaking/Part1/162.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about the time when you are busy. When are you busiest in a week? Do you often plan your week? Are you stressed when you are busy? Now, let's talk about maps. Do you ever use maps? When do people usually need to use maps? Do you prefer paper maps or electronic maps?

speaking/Part1/163.html.title: 🔖 Đề 163
speaking/Part1/163.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 1 (Social Interaction) ⏱️ Thời gian dự kiến: 3 phút 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Câu hỏi Giao tiếp xã hội Let's talk about dreams. Do you often dream? Do you often remember your dreams when you get up? Do you think dreams are important? Now, let's talk about exams at school. How do you usually feel before exams? What is your style of preparing for exams: prepare long before or just before the exams? What do you think about doing homework or home assignments?

speaking/Part2/002.html.title: 🔖 Đề 002
speaking/Part2/002.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 2 (Solution Discussion) ⏱️ Thời gian: 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Tình huống thảo luận (Situation) Situation: A school is planning to invest money in improving the quality of education. Three areas are suggested: teachers, students, and facilities. Which area do you think the school should invest in? Why?

speaking/Part2/005.html.title: 🔖 Đề 005
speaking/Part2/005.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 2 (Solution Discussion) ⏱️ Thời gian: 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Tình huống thảo luận (Situation) Situation: If you won a lottery of 1 billion VND, what would you do with the money? Three options are suggested: buying a new house, starting a business, and depositing the money in the bank. Which option do you think is the best choice? Why?

speaking/Part2/035.html.title: 🔖 Đề 035
speaking/Part2/035.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 2 (Solution Discussion) ⏱️ Thời gian: 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Tình huống thảo luận (Situation) Situation: You have just received a sum of money from your father as a birthday present. Three options are suggested: saving it for the future, buying a laptop for studying, and buying a fashionable smartphone. What would you do with the money? Why?

speaking/Part2/036.html.title: 🔖 Đề 036
speaking/Part2/036.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 2 (Solution Discussion) ⏱️ Thời gian: 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Tình huống thảo luận (Situation) Situation: An optional subject will be added to the curriculum for secondary students in your city. Three options are suggested: photography, swimming, and dancing. Which one do you think is the best option for secondary students? Why?

speaking/Part2/037.html.title: 🔖 Đề 037
speaking/Part2/037.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 2 (Solution Discussion) ⏱️ Thời gian: 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Tình huống thảo luận (Situation) Situation: You are going to take your secondary school students to the cinema. There are three types of films: cartoons, action movies, and detective movies. Which type of film do you think is the best choice for them? Why?

speaking/Part2/038.html.title: 🔖 Đề 038
speaking/Part2/038.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 2 (Solution Discussion) ⏱️ Thời gian: 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Tình huống thảo luận (Situation) Situation: Your town plans to organize an Open Festival and many visitors will attend. Three roles are suggested: a tour guide, a traffic instructor, and a master of ceremonies. Which role do you think would suit you best? Why?

speaking/Part2/039.html.title: 🔖 Đề 039
speaking/Part2/039.html.body: 🗣️ Đề thi Speaking Part 2 (Solution Discussion) ⏱️ Thời gian: 1 phút chuẩn bị + 3 phút nói 🎯 Tiêu chí: Fluency, Lexical Resource, Grammar, Pronunciation 📄 Tình huống thảo luận (Situation) Situation: Which plan would you choose for your family this weekend? Three options are suggested: going to the cinema, having a meal in a restaurant, and going to the beach. Which one do you think is the best choice? Why?

writing/00_gioi_thieu.html.title: 📌 Giới thiệu
writing/00_gioi_thieu.html.body: ✍️ Giới thiệu Kỹ năng Writing (Viết) Tổng quan Phần thi Writing (Viết) trong kỳ thi VSTEP B1 đánh giá khả năng viết tiếng Anh qua 2 bài thi, chiếm tổng cộng 1 tiếng 40 phút. Cấu trúc bài thi Phần Tên Thời gian Độ dài Trọng số Task 1 Viết Thư / Email ~20 phút ≥ 120 từ 1/3 tổng điểm Task 2 Viết Bài Luận (Essay) ~40 phút ≥ 250 từ 2/3 tổng điểm Task 1 — Viết Thư / Email Thí sinh được yêu cầu viết một bức thư hoặc email phản hồi theo một tình huống cho sẵn, giải quyết đầy đủ 3-4 điểm/câu hỏi được đề cập. Các loại thư thường gặp: Thư thân mật (Informal): gửi bạn bè, người thân. Thư trang trọng (Formal): gửi tổ chức, công ty, người lạ. Thư xin lỗi, cảm ơn, phàn nàn, yêu cầu, mời. Task 2 — Viết Bài Luận (Essay) Thí sinh đọc một đoạn trích và viết bài luận theo yêu cầu. Các dạng bài thường gặp: Opinion/Argumentative: Đồng ý / Không đồng ý với một luận điểm. Discussion: Thảo luận 2 quan điểm đối lập. Advantages & Disadvantages: Phân tích ưu/nhược điểm. Problem & Solution: Nguyên nhân và giải pháp. Lời khuyên chung Phân bổ thời gian hợp lý: 20 phút Task 1 – 40 phút Task 2. Luôn lập dàn ý trước khi viết (2-3 phút). Đọc lại bài sau khi viết xong để sửa lỗi ngữ pháp.

writing/01_tieu_chi.html.title: 🎯 Tiêu chí chấm điểm
writing/01_tieu_chi.html.body: 🎯 Tiêu chí chấm điểm Writing Bài thi Writing được chấm trên 4 tiêu chí, mỗi tiêu chí tối đa 4 điểm. 4 Tiêu chí đánh giá 1. Task Fulfillment (Hoàn thành nhiệm vụ) Trả lời đầy đủ tất cả yêu cầu của đề. Đủ độ dài (≥120 từ với Task 1, ≥250 từ với Task 2). Văn phong (formal/informal) phù hợp với ngữ cảnh đề bài. 2. Organization (Tổ chức bài viết) Cấu trúc bài rõ ràng: mở bài, thân bài, kết bài. Sử dụng từ nối (linking words) tự nhiên và đa dạng. Ý tưởng liên kết mạch lạc, không nhảy cóc. 3. Vocabulary (Từ vựng) Đa dạng từ vựng, tránh lặp từ quá nhiều. Dùng từ chính xác về nghĩa và collocation (kết hợp từ). Sử dụng được từ vựng học thuật (Task 2) hoặc phù hợp với văn phong (Task 1). 4. Grammar (Ngữ pháp) Câu đúng ngữ pháp, đa dạng cấu trúc. Kiểm soát được lỗi cơ bản: thì (tenses), mạo từ (articles), số ít/nhiều. Task 2: dùng được câu phức, mệnh đề quan hệ, câu điều kiện. Bảng quy đổi điểm Tiêu chí Điểm tối đa Điểm trung bình B1 Task Fulfillment 4 2.5 – 3.0 Organization 4 2.5 – 3.0 Vocabulary 4 2.0 – 2.5 Grammar 4 2.0 – 2.5 Tổng 16 ~9 – 11 Lưu ý trọng số: Task 1 chiếm 1/3, Task 2 chiếm 2/3 tổng điểm Writing.

writing/02_huong_dan.html.title: 📖 Hướng dẫn cách làm
writing/02_huong_dan.html.body: 📖 Hướng dẫn cách làm bài Writing 🎯 Chọn lộ trình của bạn: Lộ trình B1 (Đạt chuẩn): Ưu tiên viết đủ ý, format đúng, hạn chế lỗi ngữ pháp cơ bản. Lộ trình B2/C1 (Điểm cao): Ưu tiên từ vựng học thuật, lập luận sắc bén, cú pháp đa dạng. Task 1 — Viết Thư / Email (~20 phút) ✅ Lộ trình B1 — Đạt chuẩn Quy trình 4 bước: Bước 1 — Phân tích đề (2 phút): Xác định loại thư: Formal / Informal / Semi-formal. Gạch chân tất cả các bullet points cần đề cập. Xác định đối tượng nhận (bạn bè, sếp, tổ chức,...). Bước 2 — Lập dàn ý nhanh (2 phút): Dear [Name] / Dear Sir or Madam, Mở đầu: Lý do viết thư (1-2 câu) Đoạn 1: Đề cập yêu cầu 1 + 2 Đoạn 2: Đề cập yêu cầu 3 + 4 Kết thúc: Câu kết lịch sự (1 câu) Yours sincerely / Best regards, [Tên] Bước 3 — Viết (14 phút): Formal: Tuyệt đối không viết tắt: I am (không dùng I'm), cannot (không dùng can't). Informal: Được dùng viết tắt, ngôn ngữ thân mật. Mỗi bullet point của đề phải được đề cập ít nhất 1-2 câu. Đếm sơ bộ đủ 120 từ (khoảng 10-12 dòng viết tay). Bước 4 — Kiểm tra (2 phút):✓ Đủ 120 từ? ✓ Đủ bullet points? ✓ Format thư đúng? Linking words B1 cần thuộc: First of all, Secondly, In addition, However, Therefore, I hope to hear from you soon 🚀 Lộ trình B2/C1 — Điểm cao Nâng cấp từng phần: Mở đầu thư — Thay vì: "I am writing to ask about the course." Dùng: "I am writing to enquire about the upcoming course and would greatly appreciate any relevant information you could provide." Kết thúc thư — Thay vì: "Please reply soon." Dùng: "I look forward to receiving your prompt response at your earliest convenience." Kỹ thuật nâng điểm Vocabulary: Dùng collocations chính xác: raise a concern (không dùng say a problem), express my gratitude (không dùng say thank you). Dùng formal synonyms: seek (thay look for), reside (thay live), enquire (thay ask). Kỹ thuật nâng điểm Grammar — Câu phức: Mệnh đề quan hệ: "The accommodation, which was arranged by the agency, turned out to be..." Câu điều kiện: "Should you require any further information, please do not hesitate to contact me." Đảo ngữ nhấn mạnh: "Not only did we experience delays, but we also..." Task 2 — Viết Bài Luận (Essay) (~40 phút) ✅ Lộ trình B1 — Đạt chuẩn Quy trình 4 bước: Bước 1 — Nhận diện dạng bài (2 phút): Câu hỏi trong đề Dạng bài "Do you agree or disagree?" Opinion / Argumentative "Discuss both views" Discussion "What are the advantages and disadvantages?" Adv & Disadv "What are the causes? What solutions?" Problem & Solution Bước 2 — Lập dàn ý (5 phút): Introduction: Paraphrase đề + Thesis statement Body 1: Luận điểm 1 + Ví dụ Body 2: Luận điểm 2 + Ví dụ Conclusion: Tóm tắt + Nhắc lại thesis Bước 3 — Viết (28 phút): Mỗi đoạn thân bài = Topic sentence + Supporting ideas + Example. Đếm sơ bộ đủ 250 từ (khoảng 25 dòng viết tay). Bước 4 — Đọc lại (5 phút):✓ Đủ 250 từ? ✓ Có Thesis statement? ✓ Đủ 4 đoạn? Linking words B1 cần thuộc: Thêm ý: In addition, Furthermore, Moreover Tương phản: However, On the other hand, Nevertheless Nguyên nhân: Because, As a result, Due to Kết bài: In conclusion, To sum up, In summary 🚀 Lộ trình B2/C1 — Điểm cao Kỹ thuật viết Introduction đỉnh cao: ❌ Không nên (copy đề): "Working in pairs helps students learn better at school." ✅ Nên dùng (paraphrase + hook): "Collaborative learning strategies, particularly pair work, have long been advocated as a powerful pedagogical tool that fosters both academic achievement and interpersonal development among students. This essay will argue that, despite its limitations, peer collaboration remains a highly effective approach when implemented strategically." Kỹ thuật viết Body Paragraph đỉnh cao (Cấu trúc PEEL): Point (Topic sentence): Nêu luận điểm chính. Evidence (Ví dụ/Số liệu): Hỗ trợ bằng bằng chứng. Explanation (Giải thích): Giải thích tại sao bằng chứng đó chứng minh luận điểm. Link (Kết nối): Liên kết trở lại thesis hoặc chuyển sang đoạn tiếp. Ví dụ đoạn thân bài B2/C1: "A primary driver of youth unemployment is the widening gap between academic curricula and industry requirements. Many educational institutions continue to prioritize theoretical knowledge at the expense of practical, employment-relevant skills. For instance, a 2023 survey by the World Economic Forum revealed that over 60% of employers reported significant skill mismatches in recent graduates. This disconnect inevitably translates into extended job-seeking periods for young people, underscoring the urgent need for curriculum reform." Vocabulary học thuật cần biết: | Thông thường | Học thuật | |-------------|-----------| | show | demonstrate, illustrate | | important | crucial, pivotal, paramount | | problem | challenge, predicament, obstacle | | help | facilitate, foster, contribute to | | think | argue, contend, posit | | say | assert, maintain, acknowledge | Kỹ thuật viết Conclusion đỉnh cao: Không dùng "In conclusion, I think..." — quá đơn giản. Dùng: "In light of the evidence presented, it is evident that... Ultimately, a multi-faceted approach involving... will be indispensable in..." 🔑 So sánh nhanh B1 vs B2/C1 Tiêu chí B1 B2/C1 Số từ Đủ 120/250 từ Vượt yêu cầu: ~140/280 từ Từ vựng Đúng nghĩa, không sai Đa dạng, học thuật, ít lặp Ngữ pháp Câu đơn/ghép, ít lỗi Câu phức, đảo ngữ, không lỗi Mở/kết bài Rõ ràng, đủ ý Ấn tượng, có Thesis rõ nét Liên kết Linking words cơ bản Cohesive devices đa dạng

writing/task1/templates/01_informal_frie.title: Thư thân mật (Informal)
writing/task1/templates/01_informal_frie.body: Mẫu Thư Thân Mật (Informal Letter) - Gửi Bạn Bè Dấu hiệu nhận biết: Đề bài yêu cầu viết cho "your friend", "your pen-friend" hoặc một người họ hàng. Đây là dạng dễ nhất và chiếm đa số trong VSTEP B1. Dear [Tên người bạn đề bài cho], Thanks for your email. It is always great to hear from you. How are you and your family? I hope you are all doing well. I am writing this email to tell you about... [Điền tóm tắt 1 câu lý do viết thư] First of all, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 1. Dùng câu đơn giản: Chủ ngữ + Động từ + Tân ngữ]. For example, [Bịa thêm 1 câu ví dụ/kể lể ngắn cho đủ chữ]. Secondly, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 2]. I think it is a good idea because [Thêm 1 lý do ngắn gọn]. Finally, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 3]. Also, [Bổ sung thêm 1 thông tin kết luận]. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Please write back to me when you have free time. Best wishes, [Ký tên] 💡 Mẹo B1 CHỐNG LIỆT: Phải chép y nguyên: Đoạn mở bài Thanks for your email... và kết bài I look forward to.... Đã học thuộc là phải viết đúng 100% ngữ pháp 2 đoạn này để kéo điểm. Từ nối ăn điểm: Luôn dùng First of all, Secondly, Finally ở đầu các câu trả lời cho các Bullet points (Gạch đầu dòng). Tuyệt đối không: Không dùng các từ quá học thuật (Furthermore, Nevertheless) vì sẽ làm sai Tone của thư thân mật.

writing/task1/templates/02_formal_inquir.title: Thư trang trọng (Formal)
writing/task1/templates/02_formal_inquir.body: Mẫu Thư Trang Trọng (Formal Letter) - Khiếu Nại / Yêu Cầu Thông Tin Dấu hiệu nhận biết: Đề bài yêu cầu gửi Manager, Director, Company, Hospital, Restaurant... Thường là để phàn nàn dịch vụ lởm hoặc hỏi thông tin đặt bàn. Dear Sir/Madam, (Hoặc Dear Mr./Ms. [Tên] nếu đề cho tên đối tượng cụ thể) I am writing this letter to express my dissatisfaction with... [Điền dịch vụ/sản phẩm bị lỗi - Dành cho thư phàn nàn] HOẶC: I am writing this letter to ask for some information about... [Điền thứ cần hỏi - Dành cho thư xin thông tin]. First, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 1]. Honestly, I was very disappointed / surprised because [Nêu lý do thất vọng hoặc bất ngờ]. Second, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 2 - Thường là mô tả chi tiết chuyện gì đã xảy ra]. In addition, [Nêu thêm 1 ý bổ sung]. Finally, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 3 - Thường là yêu cầu họ phải làm gì đó để bù đắp]. Therefore, I would be grateful if you could [Yêu cầu giải quyết: refund my money (hoàn tiền) / send me more details (gửi thêm thông tin) / change it for a new one (đổi cái mới)]. I look forward to your prompt response. Yours faithfully, (Lưu ý: Nếu chào "Dear Sir/Madam" thì kết bằng "Yours faithfully". Nếu chào "Dear Mr. John" thì kết bằng "Yours sincerely") [Ký tên] 💡 Mẹo B1 CHỐNG LIỆT: Không viết tắt: Trong thư Formal KHÔNG ĐƯỢC dùng dạng rút gọn như I'm, don't, can't. Bắt buộc phải viết rõ ràng I am, do not, cannot. Thể hiện thái độ lịch sự: Dù là thư chửi khách sạn phục vụ kém, thì câu chốt vẫn phải dùng I would be grateful if you could... (Tôi rất biết ơn nếu ông có thể...). Đây là cấu trúc câu B2, học thuộc sẽ rất ăn điểm!

writing/task1/templates/03_apology_thank.title: Thư xin lỗi / Cảm ơn
writing/task1/templates/03_apology_thank.body: Mẫu Thư Xin Lỗi / Cảm Ơn (Apology / Thank You Letter) Dấu hiệu nhận biết: Đề bài bắt bạn phải từ chối một lời mời đi tiệc vì bận rộn, xin lỗi vì để làm rơi đồ, hoặc cảm ơn sếp/bạn bè đã cho mượn sách... Dear [Tên], I am writing this email to sincerely apologize for... [Điền việc mình đã lỡ hẹn hoặc làm sai] HOẶC: I am writing this email to thank you so much for... [Điền lý do cảm ơn]. First, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 1 - Thường là giải thích lý do không đi được] The reason is that [Đưa ra lý do chính đáng: I have a lot of work to do / I am terribly sick]. Second, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 2]. Besides, [Bổ sung 1 ý]. Finally, [Trả lời gạch đầu dòng 3 - Thường là yêu cầu dời lịch hẹn sang bữa khác] How about we meet on [Ghi 1 thứ trong tuần] next week? We can drink coffee and talk more. Once again, I am very sorry. HOẶC: Once again, thank you so much for your help. I hope to see you soon. Best regards, [Ký tên] 💡 Mẹo B1 CHỐNG LIỆT: Tuyệt đối dễ học: Mẫu thư này dùng được cho cả sếp (Semi-formal) và bạn bè. Template trung tính Best regards ở cuối thư dùng được cho 99% mọi hoàn cảnh. Câu hẹn kinh điển: How about we meet on... là cấu trúc đề nghị rất tự nhiên. Hãy học thuộc để ném vào cuối bất kì bức thư xin lỗi lỡ hẹn nào.

writing/task1/01.html.title: 🔖 Đề 01
writing/task1/01.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have asked your closest friend Brianna to help look after your house and pet when you are on holiday. She has written you an email asking for more information. Read this part of her email below. Great to hear that you are going to visit Dubai! I'm sure you will have a wonderful time there. Don't worry, I'll look after your house and your pet while you are away. I just want to know the time you leave for Dubai and when you will be back. I don't have a lot of experience looking after animals, so tell me how to care for your pet. Also, are there any other household duties I am supposed to do? Lots of love, Brianna Yêu cầu: Write a letter to respond to Brianna. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar. 💡 Gợi ý giải bài (Agent) Bước 1: Phân tích đề bài Dạng thư (Purpose): Thư cung cấp thông tin và hướng dẫn. Người nhận thư (Recipient): Brianna (bạn thân). Giọng điệu (Tone): Thân mật (Informal). Thì (Tense): Tương lai đơn / Hiện tại tiếp diễn mang ý nghĩa tương lai, Hiện tại đơn. Nội dung cốt lõi: Thời gian bạn khởi hành đi Dubai và lúc nào trở về. Cách chăm sóc thú cưng. Các công việc nhà (household duties) khác cần làm. Bước 2: Dàn ý (Outline) Lời chào: Dear Brianna, Mở bài: Cảm ơn Brianna đã nhận lời trông nhà và thú cưng giúp. Bày tỏ sự hào hứng về chuyến đi. Thân bài: Ý 1 (Lịch trình): Nêu cụ thể ngày, giờ chuyến bay đi và ngày giờ trở về. Ý 2 (Chăm sóc thú cưng): Đưa ra hướng dẫn đơn giản. Ý 3 (Việc nhà): Liệt kê 1-2 việc nhà nhẹ nhàng. Kết thư: Biết ơn sự giúp đỡ. Chào tạm biệt: Lots of love, / Best, Bước 3: Bài mẫu xuất sắc (Trình độ B2-C1) Dear Brianna, Thanks a million for agreeing to house-sit and look after Max for me! It takes a huge weight off my mind so I can fully enjoy my trip to Dubai without worrying about things at home. Regarding my itinerary, my flight departs next Monday at 8 AM, and I’ll be touching down back home on the following Sunday evening, around 7 PM. As for Max, please don't worry because he’s incredibly low-maintenance. You just need to feed him twice a day—once in the morning and once at 6 PM. His kibble is in the pantry, and please ensure his water bowl is always full. He’d also appreciate a short stroll around the block in the late afternoon to burn off some energy. In terms of household chores, there isn't much to fret about. Could you do me a favor and water the indoor plants every couple of days? Also, please check the mailbox and take the trash out on Thursday morning. I really owe you one! I’ll definitely bring you back a lovely souvenir from the souks in Dubai. Lots of love, (188 words) Từ vựng & Cấu trúc "ăn điểm" (Vocabulary & Highlighted Structures): Thanks a million: Cực kỳ cảm ơn (Informal). Take a huge weight off my mind: Trút bỏ gánh nặng. Itinerary (/aɪˈtɪn.ə.rər.i/): Lịch trình. Touch down: Hạ cánh. Low-maintenance: Dễ chăm sóc. Do me a favor: Giúp tôi một việc. I owe you one: Tớ nợ cậu một ân tình. Bước 4: Bài mẫu an toàn (Trình độ B1) Dear Brianna, Thank you so much for your help. I am very happy that you will look after my house and my pet when I travel to Dubai. First, let me tell you about my schedule. I will leave for Dubai at 8 a.m. next Monday. I will come back home on Sunday evening next week. Second, my dog's name is Max. He is very friendly so you don't need to worry. You just need to feed him two times a day: in the morning and in the evening. His food is in the kitchen. Please give him some clean water too. Finally, about the household duties, you don't need to do much. Please help me water the plants in the living room every two days. Also, remember to take out the trash on Thursday night. Thank you again for your kindness. I will buy a special gift for you from Dubai. Love, (158 words)

writing/task1/03.html.title: 🔖 Đề 03
writing/task1/03.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have received this email from an English-speaking friend, Alex. Read part of his email below. Some friends of mine are going backpacking next month around Vietnam. They would like to learn about Vietnamese culture and its history. Where should they begin the trip? What's the easiest way to get around? Where should they stay as they are on a tight budget? Yêu cầu: Write an email responding to him, giving advice on travel routes, transportation, and accommodation. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/05.html.title: 🔖 Đề 05
writing/task1/05.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài This is an extract from your pen-friend's postcard: I'm having a busy time at the moment as I have to write lots of Christmas cards to all my friends and relatives. Do you celebrate Christmas in Vietnam? What holidays are celebrated in your country? What is your favourite holiday? How do you celebrate it? Well, I'd better go now. I've got to help mum with cooking. I can't wait to hear from you. Lots of love, Dan Write a letter responding to Dan. In your letter: Answer his questions about Vietnamese holidays. Ask 3 questions about British holidays. Yêu cầu: You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/07.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have received this email from an English-speaking friend, Alex. Read part of his email below. Some friends of mine are going backpacking next month around Vietnam. They would like to learn about Vietnamese culture and its history. Where should they begin the trip? What's the easiest way to get around? Where should they stay as they are on a tight budget? Yêu cầu: Write an email to Alex responding to his questions and giving advice on travel routes, transportation, and accommodation. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/13.html.title: 🔖 Đề 13
writing/task1/13.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have received the following email from your English pen friend, Anne: It's a really brave step to take a year out of college to come and spend 6 months in the UK! What are you planning to do with your time? Find a job? Learn some new skills? Yêu cầu: Write back and give me more details of your plans so I can do my best to help you have a good time. Write an email to Anne, responding to her questions and sharing your plans for your time in the UK. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/23.html.title: 🔖 Đề 23
writing/task1/23.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài Read this extract from a letter you have recently sent to a friend: Oh, and by the way, don't go to XYZ Restaurant for your birthday. We went there last night - the service was awful and the food was a disaster! I complained to the head waiter but he asked me to put it in writing. Yêu cầu: Write a formal letter to the restaurant manager complaining about your experience and requesting appropriate action. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/25.html.title: 🔖 Đề 25
writing/task1/25.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have read the following information from a Singaporean university, and have decided to apply for a course: The university welcomes applications to all its courses from overseas students. Please write to the Admissions Officer giving details of the course you wish to apply for and why. Your letter should include an outline of your qualifications and any other relevant information. Yêu cầu: Write a formal letter to the Admissions Officer applying for the course, outlining your qualifications and explaining why you are interested in studying at this university. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/31.html.title: 🔖 Đề 31
writing/task1/31.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have received this email from a friend called Bill. Read part of his email below. Well, I have had some health problems recently. I don't know the exact reason, but I think it may come from my smoking. I started smoking a couple of months ago and I'm becoming dependent on it. Every day I smoke a few cigarettes, maybe 4-5. Could you please give me some advice? I feel quite depressed. Yêu cầu: Write an email to Bill, giving him advice on how to quit smoking and offering support. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/33.html.title: 🔖 Đề 33
writing/task1/33.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have received this email from an English-speaking pen friend. I'm a rock fan. I can listen to rock all day. What about you? What kind of music do you like? What is your favourite song and artist? Please write to tell me more about your music taste. Yêu cầu: Write an email to your friend responding to their questions and sharing your music preferences. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/35.html.title: 🔖 Đề 35
writing/task1/35.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You have just received a letter from a friend, Audrey, asking about your new puppy. It’s great to receive your letter. I’m sorry I haven’t written for a long time. I was busy preparing for final exams. I also try to help my parents with the housework since they are busy all day. What a great news you have a new puppy! I really love puppies because they are cute. What’s the name of your puppy? Why have you decided to give it that name? Who gave you such a wonderful gift? Also, do you have any difficulties looking after it? Yêu cầu: Write a letter responding to Audrey. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/36.html.title: 🔖 Đề 36
writing/task1/36.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You are the school trip organizer. You received an email from a student, Ethan, asking for some information about next month's trip. I’m really interested in the school trip you are going to organize next month to a historical museum. I’m writing to ask for information about the fee, the date and time so that I can arrange my time to join you. How can we get there and what activities are planned for the visit? Should I bring lunch along? Yêu cầu: Write an email responding to Ethan. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/37.html.title: 🔖 Đề 37
writing/task1/37.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You received a letter from your friend, Joan, telling about her birthday party and asking you to describe your last birthday party. Yesterday I had a wonderful birthday party with my family and friends. When I came home from school, I was surprised when I saw a huge birthday cake made by my mother. My house was decorated for the party and all my close friends and relatives were there. We sang birthday songs and enjoyed delicious food. It was a great party. How about your last birthday party? What did you do? How did you feel then? Did you enjoy it? Hope to hear from you soon. Yêu cầu: Write an email responding to her. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/38.html.title: 🔖 Đề 38
writing/task1/38.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You received a letter from your friend, John, asking for information about a short trip in your country. I’m so excited to let you know that I’ve won the second prize in an art competition in my area. My mum has decided to give me a trip as a present, and I’m thinking of a short trip to your country this summer. Could you give me some advice? I want to travel to beautiful places in your country in 2 weeks with my mum. Where should I go? What can we do there? What’s the weather like in your country? Hope to hear from you soon. Yêu cầu: Write an email responding to him. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/39.html.title: 🔖 Đề 39
writing/task1/39.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You received a letter from your friend, Peter, telling about his short trip with his dad. Hi, how are you doing? I was feeling excited about the journey on a trip with my dad. This was my first journey on the sea. So I was a bit nervous and was very worried about being sea-sick. Luckily, I was fine on the entire journey, and there were some great moments when I saw the sunrise and sunset. I also took a lot of photos with my dad and new friends on this journey. What about you? Tell me about your last holiday. Did you enjoy it? What are you going to do after the holiday? Yêu cầu: Write a letter responding to him. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/40.html.title: 🔖 Đề 40
writing/task1/40.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You received a letter from your friend, Joan, asking for some information about your school facilities. Thank you very much for letting me know about the one-year student exchange program at your school. I’m thinking of joining this program and hope that we can meet each other at your school next year. I’m quite busy this time with a lot of exams. How about you? Do you have to do a lot of tests? Give me some information about the school facilities, library, sports center, your teachers, and your school schedule. Yêu cầu: Write a letter responding to him. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/41.html.title: 🔖 Đề 41
writing/task1/41.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You received a letter from your friend, Robert, asking you to buy his tickets for a band performance. Next week, Linkin Park is coming to Hanoi to rock this city. I don’t want to miss my favorite band’s live performance, and I bought two tickets last month. I had planned to enjoy the performance with my brother, but I have to cancel it due to a family event. Are you going back to our hometown to meet our grandparents on their 50th wedding anniversary? I know how much you love Linkin Park. Do you want to buy these tickets to enjoy the show? How many tickets do you want? How much can you pay for the ticket? How can you receive the ticket? Yêu cầu: Write a letter responding to him. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/42.html.title: 🔖 Đề 42
writing/task1/42.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You received a letter from a visitor, Sam, asking for some information about a house for rent. We’re going to visit London next month. I just saw your advertisement for flats today and I am writing to ask for more information. There’ll be 10 people in our group, so how many flats would we need to rent and how much will the total cost be for one week? I’d like to know what the flats are equipped with and what kinds of facilities are available nearby. Are there any shopping centers? Finally, is it convenient to get to the city center from your place? Yêu cầu: Write a letter responding to him. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/43.html.title: 🔖 Đề 43
writing/task1/43.html.body: 📝 Đề thi Writing Task 1 (Thư / Email) ⏱️ Thời gian làm bài: Khoảng 20 phút ✍️ Độ dài yêu cầu: Ít nhất 120 từ 🎯 Tiêu chí đánh giá: Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary, Grammar 📄 Nội dung đề bài You’ve just received a letter from John - an English pen friend. Hi, how are you? I have had a health check with my doctor. He informed me that my eyes are becoming worse than they were. Perhaps this happens because I spend too much time watching TV every day. I love spending hours watching my favorite channel after doing my homework. How much time do you watch TV a day? What else do you do to relax? Give me some interesting ideas for free-time activities. How much do you like watching TV? Describe some popular programs and give details about your hobbies. Yêu cầu: Write an email responding to him. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name. Your response will be evaluated in terms of Task Fulfillment, Organization, Vocabulary and Grammar.

writing/task1/44.html.title: 🔖 Đề 44

Hi, how are you? The teacher in the literature class asked me to write about one of the movies I like the best. As you know, I don’t like watching movies and I don’t go to the cinema often. Thus, I don’t know which movies I should see now or which movie I should write about. Could you tell me about your favorite movie? (Name of the movie, what kind of movie, what is it about?) When did you see it and why do you like it? Yêu cầu: Write a letter responding to him. You should write at least 120 words. Do not include your name.
